scripts.audit:no-price: echo 'Audit: public pricing strings' && (! grep -rn 'สอบถามราคา\|บาท\|฿' src --include='*.jsx' --include='*.js' | grep -v 'src/data/brand.js')
scripts.audit:no-shineandshield: echo 'Audit: rejected positioning copy' && (! grep -rn 'Shine and Shield\|Protect Without Sacrificing' src --include='*.jsx' --include='*.js')
scripts.audit: npm run audit:no-price && npm run audit:no-shineandshield && echo '✓ All audits passed'
